findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: final-round verification confirms prior blocking finding f2 remains unresolved. Explicitly supplied DesignContextFiles are still accepted without per-entry resolution, so invalid refs proceed to reviewer selection instead of failing with design-context-unresolved: and status unresolved_design_context; the required mixed/all-invalid reviewer-never-invoked tests are still absent. The worktree-visible state.md lines 320-338 acknowledges the blocker but explicitly says the maintainer decision is pending, so it is not a recorded human-approved deferral. Stop the autonomous review/fix loop and have the maintainer choose either implementing T034b strict resolution and paired tests or recording a qualifying visible deferral with approver and carry destination.
